case_title: LAKEWOOD CONSTRUCTION SPECIALTIES VS DOERR, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY LAKEWOOD CONSTRUCTION SPECIALTIES AS TO DEFENDANT DOERR, JOHN CAL TECH STORE FIXTURES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAKEWOOD CONSTRUCTION SPECIALTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOERR, JOHN CAL TECH STORE FIXTURES, INC. $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,820.00, JOHN DOERR IS DISMISED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SEVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOERR, JOHN
NOTICE FO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO CAL TECH FIXTURES, INC. RETURNED--NO MAIL RECEPTACLE
